about.description: Capabilities granted to the About panel window opened via the `open_about_window` Tauri command. Kept tight — only what about.html actually needs: read the app version (core:app), open external URLs through the Rust opener plugin, and close itself. NO file system, dialog, notification, or sidecar IPC permissions are granted to this window.

default.description: Capabilities granted to the main Graphnosis window. Kept minimal — folder picking, OS shell open (for the cortex folder), keychain access, and the invoke commands we expose.
